name: Inferno Hammer
name_jp: インフェルノ・ハンマー
desc: When this card destroys your opponent's monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, you can select 1 face-up monster on your opponent's side of the field and flip it into face-down Defense Position.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys your opponent's monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, you can select 1 face-up monster on your opponent's side of the field and flip it into face-down Defense Position.
eff: When this card destroys your opponent's monster and sends it to the Graveyard as a result of battle, you can select 1 face-up monster on your opponent's side of the field and flip it into face-down Defense Position.

sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! Capsule Monster Coliseum promotional cards

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
